data.title: Infosys expands in Switzerland with new Zurich office to accelerate Enterprise AI, correcting previous news release issued on 23-Jan-2026.
data.description: Infosys is increasing its presence in Switzerland by establishing a new office in Zurich. The company aims to speed up enterprise Artificial Intelligence initiatives. The news was announced on 23-Jan-2026. The expansion highlights Infosys’ commitment to enhancing its AI capabilities and offerings. This development signifies a strategic move to tap into the growing AI market in Switzerland. The new Zurich office will serve as a hub for AI projects, fostering technological advancements in the region. This step is part of Infosys' broader strategy to strengthen its position in the global AI landscape. The move is expected to create numerous job opportunities and contribute to the local economy.

data.title: $165B AI Data Center in New Mexico to host OpenAI, as Oracle confirms partnership for AI infrastructure at Project Jupiter.
data.description: Oracle has announced its plans to implement artificial intelligence infrastructure for OpenAI at Project Jupiter, a substantial data center campus. The project is supported by $165 billion in industrial revenue bonds.

data.title: Richmond American Homes opens Legacy Pointe at Looking Glass in Parker, showcasing new homes with innovative features.
data.description: New homes with cutting-edge features are being unveiled at Legacy Pointe at Looking Glass in Parker, Colorado. The Grand Opening of this development by Richmond American Homes of Colorado, Inc. is set for Jan. 23, 2026. Interested buyers can learn more at RichmondAmerican.com/LegacyPointe.

data.title: Bitcoin remains at $89,740. Cryptocurrency data: Ethereum at $2,948, XRP at $1.93, Dogecoin at $0.1245. Over 100k traders liquidated in 24 hours for $303.35 million. Top gainers include LayerZero, Axie Infinity, and DoubleZero. UBS plans Bitcoin, Ethereum trading.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading at around $90,000 alongside other cryptocurrencies hovering around key levels. According to latest data, Bitcoin is priced at $89,740, Ethereum at $2,948, Solana at $127.76, XRP at $1.93, Dogecoin at $0.1245, and Shiba Inu at $0.058021. A total of 102,360 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses amounting to $303.35 million. Within the same period, top gainers included LayerZero, Axie Infinity, and DoubleZero. The crypto market may see potential changes as a Market Structure Bill is set for a crucial debate on Tuesday, while UBS is reportedly considering offering Bitcoin and Ethereum trading services for wealthy clients. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Painting expert explains stucco paint failure in Brookhaven due to humidity. Shaun Taddia provides insights.
data.description: In Brookhaven, Georgia, on January 23, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation delves into the issue of stucco paint peeling or bubbling due to the area's high humidity levels. Painting Expert Shaun Taddia from Rhino Shield by Georgia Coatings, Inc. provides key insights in the article. This feature investigates the reasons behind this common problem caused by the humidity in Brookhaven.

data.title: RapiCure and Allan Edwards, Inc. partner for industry's first "Minute-class" repair system for pipeline maintenance.
data.description: In Loveland, Colorado, on January 23, 2026, RapiCure Solutions (RapiCure) introduced the TimeWarp™ "minute-class" Repair System, aimed at assisting pipeline operations in overcoming time constraints during essential maintenance. This system is designed to address the challenges posed by aging infrastructure. RapiCure, known for its fast-paced innovations, showcased this new product, which promises to revolutionize pipeline maintenance processes.

data.description: Travel disruptions are expected across the Eastern U.S. due to icy conditions, sleet, and heavy snow. Significant snowfall is forecasted, with potential impacts on transportation and daily commutes. Residents are advised to stay informed about weather updates and exercise caution while traveling.

data.title: TikTok updates US Terms, following parent company spinning out US entity to manage platform operations. #TikTok #USA
data.description: After the Chinese parent company of the app, the decision was made to establish a separate American entity to oversee TikTok operations in the United States. This move was in response to regulatory concerns and security issues surrounding the app. The new entity will be responsible for managing TikTok's operations in the US and ensuring compliance with local laws and regulations. This change comes amidst growing scrutiny of TikTok's data handling practices and its potential impact on national security. It is seen as a strategic move to address these concerns and maintain the app's presence in the US market.

data.title: Dr. Larry Schlesinger supports science-based immunization schedules and highlights the importance of vaccines in saving lives.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, in San Antonio, a statement was issued regarding the ongoing debate around the relevance of established vaccine guidelines. The emphasis was placed on endorsing evidence-based vaccination timetables and acknowledging the significant impact vaccines have had in preserving lives.

data.title: Avangrid celebrates International Day of Education on Jan 24, 2026, enhancing workforce development and community partnerships. CEO highlights commitment to education and collaboration.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company from the Iberdrola Group, is recognizing International Day of Education on January 24, 2026. They are emphasizing their dedication to education, research, and workforce growth within their company and the communities they operate in. Avangrid's CEO, Jose Antonio Miranda, stated, “Education has a profound impact on individuals and communities. Avangrid aims to facilitate opportunities through collaborations and investments in education and training programs.” The company is committed to making a difference by supporting education initiatives and fostering community development.

data.title: Goodwill opened new store in Waconia, MN on Jan 23, 2026 at 860 Marketplace Drive, with over 100 people celebrating.
data.description: In Waconia, Minnesota, a new Goodwill store at 860 Marketplace Drive was inaugurated on January 23, 2026, amid festivities attended by more than 100 individuals including local officials and residents. The grand opening event marked an important milestone for the community.

data.title: FirstEnergy Corp. ready for winter storm; offering safety tips during extreme cold. Stay safe and warm. #Akron #NYSE #FE
data.description: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE), based in Akron, Ohio, is gearing up to address the impact of a widespread winter storm and freezing temperatures across the nation on January 23, 2026. The electric company has mobilized crews in anticipation of the inclement weather. They are urging customers to be vigilant and take necessary precautions to ensure their safety during this challenging period. It is essential for consumers to be proactive in safeguarding themselves and their property.[float:right][January 23, 2026][/float]
